signals.raw:
No recent confirmations, announcements, or resolutions** are reported that could shift odds, though real-time trading on tweet predictions reflects trader sentiment on pop culture events like Kanye tweeting by April 30[3].  
Trending categories also include general "Trending Markets" (166 live, $3M volume, e.g., Nasdaq 24/7 trading by June 30) but lack specific X buzz or moves[1].
